title: AVM Modpack
description: This adds Stick Figures From Animation Vs Animator. Powers You Can Get From Just Using One Command And Trust me its Real Good.
body:
**This Modpack Adds The Stick Figures From Animation Vs Animator.** 
 When You Get Powers From 1 Command And Choose them It will be Really Good


 When You Do One Run Of Minecraft It Will Be Very Fun. Winning Minecraft Is Easy When You Are A Stick Figure WITH POWERS.
**_Its Super Fun When You Are A GOD And Nothing Can Stop You._**

_**When You Download This Modpack. You Will BE A GOD! But Mobs Can Stop You When You Dont Have Any Powers.**_

To Choose A Stick Figure Use B To Become Any Stick figure Of Your Choosing.

The stick figure is client sided And Powers server sided but you need the server to have the modpack too for everyone to see you using the powers and being a stick figure while playing with your powers.
